name: Phase Connect (Horny edition)
description:
This only has 15 of the members right now, those being Clara, Ember, Airi, Dizzy, Panko, Lia, Uruka, Lumi, Muyu, Jelly, Erina, Shiina, Eimi, and Tenma. Oh and Pippa too I guess

Update: Just added Remi, Nasa, Michiru, and Iori (I don't know too much about Iori and Michiru and didn't have a friend who knows watches them so I apologize if their personalities are not ideal). Hime has just been added.

Also I apologize if it's a bit or very scuffed as this is my first public bot and I'm not confident in my detail work with their personalities.

I hope you enjoy it
creator: Pandapple
